input.search_term: Checkmk resource requirements server agent CPU RAM small site 2024 2025

content.text:
Для вашего масштаба (офис, десятки хостов/ВМ) Checkmk нагрузкой почти не заметен.

### Сервер Checkmk (одна ВМ на Proxmox)

| Объём | RAM | CPU | Диск |
|---|---|---|---|
| до ~50 хостов | **2 GB** | **2 vCPU** | ~20 GB |
| до ~500 | 4 GB | 4 vCPU | ~50 GB |

Практически для Порта: ВМ **2–4 vCPU / 4 GB RAM / 40 GB SSD** — с запасом. Нагрузка на Proxmox как у лёгкой служебной ВМ, не как у почты или 1С.

### Агенты на мониторимых хостах

- Очень лёгкие (по задумке «почти ноль»).
- Обычно **доли % CPU** раз в минуту при опросе + **десятки МБ RAM**.
- Тяжелее становится только от самописных/тяжёлых плагинов (например, PowerShell раз в минуту) — штатные проверки так не жрут.

SNMP (MikroTik и т.п.) на устройстве ещё легче агента.

### На что реально влияет нагрузка

1. **Число сервисов × частота проверок**, а не «купили Checkmk».  
2. Активные проверки (HTTP/IMAP с сервера Checkmk) чуть грузят сам сервер Checkmk, не цели.  
3. История/графики — место на диске со временем.

### Сравнение грубо

| | Нагрузка на инфраструктуру |
|---|---|
| Checkmk / Zabbix (ваш масштаб) | низкая |
| Prometheus+Grafana стек | низкая–средняя |
| Deckhouse Observability | высокая (нужен целый K8s) |

**Итог:** для Порта Checkmk — это спокойно одна небольшая ВМ. Мониторируемые серверы почти не почувствуют. Узкое место будет не CPU, а насколько аккуратно настроите интервалы и лишние проверки.

[REDACTED]

<timestamp>Thursday, Jul 16, 2026, 9:10 AM (UTC+7)</timestamp>
<user_query>
мне в целом нужен полноценный интерфейс внутри которого я смогу помечать ихзменения, условно если база трубки сменилась. Ну и там же мониторинг, сейчас подними Checkmk и потом вайбкодь мне такой интерфейс, главное правило - не сломай ничего в процессе
</user_query>

Поднимаю Checkmk на отдельной новой ВМ, без остановки существующих сервисов. Сначала проверю ресурсы Proxmox и свободный слот.

todos.content: Создать новый LXC 125 + Docker Checkmk на .170 (не трогать прод)

input.contents:
#!/bin/bash
# SAFE: create NEW LXC only. Never stop/modify existing VMs.
set -euo pipefail

CTID=125
IP=192.168.2.170
GW=192.168.2.1
HOSTNAME=checkmk
STORAGE=local-lvm
TEMPLATE=local:vztmpl/debian-12-standard_12.12-1_amd64.tar.zst

echo "=== SAFETY: only creating NEW CT $CTID ==="
if pct status "$CTID" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "CT $CTID already exists: $(pct status $CTID)"
  exit 0
fi

# ping check - refuse if IP taken
if ping -c1 -W1 "$IP" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "ABORT: $IP already responds to ping"
  exit 1
fi

# ensure template present
if [ ! -f /var/lib/vz/template/cache/debian-12-standard_12.12-1_amd64.tar.zst ]; then
  echo "Downloading debian-12 template..."
  pveam download local debian-12-standard_12.12-1_amd64.tar.zst
fi

echo "Creating CT $CTID..."
pct create "$CTID" "$TEMPLATE" \
  --hostname "$HOSTNAME" \
  --cores 2 \
  --memory 4096 \
  --swap 1024 \
  --rootfs "${STORAGE}:40" \
  --net0 name=eth0,bridge=vmbr0,ip=${IP}/24,gw=${GW},firewall=0 \
  --nameserver 192.168.2.1 \
  --features nesting=1,keyctl=1 \
  --unprivileged 1 \
  --onboot 1 \
  --start 1 \
  --password 'CheckmkPort1!' \
  --description 'Checkmk monitoring - do not confuse with prod services'

sleep 5
pct status "$CTID"
echo "Waiting for network..."
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  if ping -c1 -W1 "$IP" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "PING_OK"
    break
  fi
  sleep 2
done

# install docker + checkmk inside CT
pct exec "$CTID" -- bash -lc '
set -e
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
apt-get update -qq
apt-get install -y -qq ca-certificates curl gnupg
install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings
curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/debian/gpg -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc
chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc
echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc] https://download.docker.com/linux/debian bookworm stable" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list
apt-get update -qq
apt-get install -y -qq docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-compose-plugin
mkdir -p /opt/checkmk/sites
docker pull checkmk/check-mk-raw:2.3.0-latest
docker rm -f checkmk 2>/dev/null || true
docker run -dit \
  --restart always \
  --name checkmk \
  -v /opt/checkmk/sites:/omd/sites \
  -p 8080:5000 \
  -p 8000:8000 \
  checkmk/check-mk-raw:2.3.0-latest
sleep 8
docker ps
docker logs checkmk 2>&1 | tail -40
'

echo "=== DONE CT $CTID at http://${IP}:8080/${HOSTNAME}/ ==="
echo "Try also http://${IP}:8080/ "
pct exec "$CTID" -- docker logs checkmk 2>&1 | tail -20 || true

input.contents:
#!/bin/bash
# SAFE: only CT 125. No qm stop/destroy of any VM.
set +e
echo "=== kill hung stop for CT 125 only ==="
pkill -9 -f 'pct stop 125' 2>/dev/null
pkill -9 -f 'lxc-stop -n 125' 2>/dev/null
# if still stuck, hard-kill the lxc-start for 125
P=$(pgrep -f 'lxc-start -F -n 125' | head -1)
if [ -n "$P" ]; then
  echo "killing lxc-start pid $P"
  kill -9 "$P" 2>/dev/null
fi
sleep 2
pct unlock 125 2>/dev/null
pct status 125 2>&1
# start if stopped
if ! pct status 125 2>/dev/null | grep -q running; then
  echo "starting CT 125..."
  pct start 125
  sleep 5
fi
pct status 125
ping -c2 -W2 192.168.2.170

echo "=== remove broken docker leftovers, install native Checkmk ==="
pct exec 125 -- bash -lc '
set -e
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
# stop docker if present - do not fail
systemctl stop docker 2>/dev/null || true
docker rm -f checkmk 2>/dev/null || true

apt-get update -qq
apt-get install -y -qq wget ca-certificates libjpeg62-turbo libevent-2.1-7 libapr1

# download Checkmk Raw for bookworm
cd /tmp
VER=2.3.0p30
DEB="check-mk-raw-${VER}_0.bookworm_amd64.deb"
if [ ! -f "$DEB" ]; then
  wget -q "https://download.checkmk.com/checkmk/${VER}/${DEB}" -O "$DEB" || \
  wget -q "https://download.checkmk.com/checkmk/2.3.0p27/check-mk-raw-2.3.0p27_0.bookworm_amd64.deb" -O check-mk-raw.deb
fi
ls -lh /tmp/check-mk-raw*.deb
apt-get install -y -qq ./check-mk-raw*.deb || dpkg -i ./check-mk-raw*.deb || apt-get -f install -y -qq

# create site if missing
if [ ! -d /omd/sites/cmk ]; then
  omd create cmk
fi
omd stop cmk 2>/dev/null || true
# listen on all interfaces
su - cmk -c "omd config set APACHE_TCP_ADDR 0.0.0.0" || true
omd start cmk
omd status cmk
ss -ltnp | grep -E "5000|80" || netstat -ltnp | grep -E "5000|80" || true
# show password file if exists
ls /omd/sites/cmk/ 2>/dev/null | head
cat /omd/sites/cmk/var/log/apache/error_log 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || true
'

# open via host? CT has its own IP
curl -sI --max-time 5 http://192.168.2.170/cmk/ 2>&1 | head -10
curl -sI --max-time 5 http://192.168.2.170:5000/cmk/ 2>&1 | head -10
echo DONE_NATIVE

#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo "=== find mounts of 125 ==="
mount | grep -E '125|vm-125' || true
losetup -a | grep 125 || true
dmsetup ls | grep 125 || true
# who holds the LV
fuser -vm /dev/pve/vm-125-disk-0 2>&1 || true
lsof /dev/pve/vm-125-disk-0 2>&1 | head || true

# try umount any leftover rootfs
for m in $(mount | awk '/vm-125|125\/rootfs/{print $3}'); do
  echo "umount $m"
  umount -l "$m" 2>/dev/null || true
done

#!/bin/bash
set -e
CT=126
echo "=== install Checkmk on CT $CT only ==="
pct exec $CT -- bash -lc '
set -e
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
apt-get update -qq
apt-get install -y -qq wget ca-certificates curl
cd /tmp
# try recent raw packages
for VER in 2.3.0p30 2.3.0p29 2.3.0p28 2.3.0p27 2.2.0p41; do
  DEB="check-mk-raw-${VER}_0.bookworm_amd64.deb"
  echo "try $DEB"
  if wget -q --spider "https://download.checkmk.com/checkmk/${VER}/${DEB}"; then
    wget -q "https://download.checkmk.com/checkmk/${VER}/${DEB}" -O /tmp/checkmk.deb
    break
  fi
done
ls -lh /tmp/checkmk.deb
apt-get install -y -qq /tmp/checkmk.deb
omd version
omd create cmk <<EOF
EOF
# default admin password is shown at create - capture
omd config cmk set APACHE_TCP_ADDR 0.0.0.0 || true
omd start cmk
omd status cmk
ss -ltn | head -20
'
# get password from create output - re-run create info
pct exec $CT -- bash -lc 'cat /omd/sites/cmk/.password 2>/dev/null; ls /omd/sites/cmk/; grep -r "password" /omd/sites/cmk/etc/htpasswd 2>/dev/null | head; # reset admin pw to known
su - cmk -c "htpasswd -b /omd/sites/cmk/etc/htpasswd cmkadmin PortCmk1!" 2>/dev/null || \
  omd su cmk -c "htpasswd -b ~/etc/htpasswd cmkadmin PortCmk1!" 2>/dev/null || true
# Checkmk 2.x uses cmk-passwd
su - cmk -c "cmk-passwd -b cmkadmin PortCmk1!" 2>&1 || true
'
curl -sI --max-time 8 http://192.168.2.172/cmk/ 2>&1 | head -15
curl -sI --max-time 8 http://192.168.2.172:5000/cmk/ 2>&1 | head -15

# cleanup leftover 125 holder (only that pid)
echo "=== cleanup orphan 125 ==="
if [ -e /proc/668846 ]; then
  kill -9 668846 2>/dev/null || true
  sleep 1
fi
fuser -km /dev/pve/vm-125-disk-0 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 1
lvremove -fy /dev/pve/vm-125-disk-0 2>&1 || true
rm -f /etc/pve/lxc/125.conf
lvs | grep 125 || echo "125 cleaned"
# confirm prod
qm status 124
ping -c1 -W1 192.168.2.140 >/dev/null && echo MAIL_OK
echo DONE_CMK

#!/bin/bash
# Deploy Port Infra UI onto CT 126 ONLY — no changes to other VMs
set -e
CT=126
echo "=== deploy port-infra to CT $CT ==="
pct exec $CT -- bash -lc '
set -e
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
apt-get update -qq
apt-get install -y -qq python3 python3-pip python3-venv
mkdir -p /opt/port-infra
'
# copy files via push
pct push $CT /tmp/port-infra-app.py /opt/port-infra/app.py
pct push $CT /tmp/port-infra-req.txt /opt/port-infra/requirements.txt

pct exec $CT -- bash -lc '
set -e
cd /opt/port-infra
python3 -m venv .venv
. .venv/bin/activate
pip install -q -r requirements.txt
cat > /etc/systemd/system/port-infra.service <<EOF
[Unit]
Description=Port Infra UI
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
WorkingDirectory=/opt/port-infra
Environment=PORT_INFRA_DB=/opt/port-infra/data.db
Environment=CMK_URL=http://127.0.0.1/cmk
Environment=CMK_USER=cmkadmin
Environment=CMK_PASS=PortCmk1!
ExecStart=/opt/port-infra/.venv/bin/uvicorn app:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3080
Restart=always
RestartSec=3

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
systemctl daemon-reload
systemctl enable --now port-infra
sleep 2
systemctl is-active port-infra
curl -sI http://127.0.0.1:3080/api/health | head -5
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:3080/api/health
'
curl -sI --max-time 5 http://192.168.2.172:3080/api/health | head -8
curl -s --max-time 5 http://192.168.2.172:3080/api/health
# safety check prod
qm status 124
ping -c1 -W1 192.168.2.140 >/dev/null && echo MAIL_OK
echo DEPLOY_DONE

#!/bin/bash
# Populate Checkmk with office hosts (ping-only). Runs inside CT 126.
set -euo pipefail
CMK=http://127.0.0.1/cmk/check_mk/api/1.0
AUTH="cmkadmin:PortCmk1!"

api() {
  local method=$1 path=$2
  shift 2
  curl -sS -u "$AUTH" -X "$method" \
    -H "Accept: application/json" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    "$@" \
    "${CMK}${path}"
}

echo "=== create folder Port ==="
api POST "/domain-types/folder_config/collections/all" \
  -d '{"name":"port","title":"Port Office","attributes":{}}' || true

# host_name -> ip|alias
declare -A HOSTS=(
  [proxmox]="192.168.2.21|Proxmox port2"
  [mail]="192.168.2.140|postfix mail VM124"
  [samba]="192.168.2.15|Samba share"
  [proxy]="192.168.2.14|HAProxy proxy VM121"
  [mikopbx]="192.168.2.116|MikoPBX VM119"
  [gateway]="192.168.2.1|MikroTik gateway"
  [checkmk]="192.168.2.172|Checkmk CT126"
  [crm]="192.168.2.122|CRM-PROD approx"
  [ansible]="192.168.2.47|Ansible if alive"
  [portbot]="192.168.2.160|portbot"
  [graylog-host]="192.168.2.111|Graylog placeholder"
)

# resolve real IPs for VMs we know from config where possible
# crm / graylog / ansible may be wrong — only add if ping works

add_host() {
  local name=$1 ip=$2 alias=$3
  echo "ADD $name $ip"
  api POST "/domain-types/host_config/collections/all" \
    -d "$(python3 - <<PY
import json
print(json.dumps({
  "folder": "/port",
  "host_name": "$name",
  "attributes": {
    "ipaddress": "$ip",
    "alias": "$alias",
    "tag_agent": "no-agent",
    "tag_piggyback": "auto-piggyback"
  }
}))
PY
)" || api POST "/domain-types/host_config/collections/all" \
    -d "{\"folder\":\"/\",\"host_name\":\"$name\",\"attributes\":{\"ipaddress\":\"$ip\",\"alias\":\"$alias\",\"tag_agent\":\"no-agent\"}}"
}

# Prefer pingable hosts only
CANDIDATES=(
  "proxmox|192.168.2.21|Proxmox port2"
  "mail|192.168.2.140|Mail postfix VM124"
  "samba|192.168.2.15|Samba Share"
  "proxy|192.168.2.14|HAProxy Proxy"
  "mikopbx|192.168.2.116|MikoPBX"
  "gateway|192.168.2.1|MikroTik GW"
  "checkmk|127.0.0.1|Checkmk self"
)

# Try discover more IPs from arp/ping of known list
EXTRA=(
  "192.168.2.10|host-10"
  "192.168.2.12|host-12"
  "192.168.2.100|zabbix-guess"
  "192.168.2.114|grafana-guess"
)

for row in "${CANDIDATES[@]}"; do
  IFS='|' read -r n ip al <<<"$row"
  if ping -c1 -W1 "$ip" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    add_host "$n" "$ip" "$al" || echo "skip/exists $n"
  else
    echo "SKIP offline $n $ip"
  fi
done

# Find zabbix/grafana IPs via neighbour or just try common
for ip in 192.168.2.10 192.168.2.12 192.168.2.100 192.168.2.109 192.168.2.111 192.168.2.114 192.168.2.122 192.168.2.130 192.168.2.160; do
  if ping -c1 -W1 "$ip" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    short="host-${ip##*.}"
    add_host "$short" "$ip" "auto $ip" || true
  fi
done

echo "=== list hosts ==="
api GET "/domain-types/host_config/collections/all" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d.get("value",[])),"hosts");
[print(x.get("id"), x.get("extensions",{}).get("attributes",{}).get("ipaddress")) for x in d.get("value",[])]'

echo "=== activate changes ==="
# get etag
ETAG=$(curl -sS -u "$AUTH" -D - -o /dev/null -H "Accept: application/json" \
  "${CMK}/domain-types/activation_run/collections/pending_changes" | tr -d '\r' | awk -F': ' 'tolower($1)=="etag"{print $2}')
echo "ETAG=$ETAG"
curl -sS -u "$AUTH" -X POST \
  -H "Accept: application/json" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "If-Match: ${ETAG:-*}" \
  -d '{"redirect":false,"sites":["cmk"],"force_foreign_changes":true}' \
  "${CMK}/domain-types/activation_run/actions/activate-changes/invoke" | python3 -m json.tool | head -40

sleep 5
echo "=== service discovery bulk (tabula rasa / fixall) ==="
# For each host run discovery
api GET "/domain-types/host_config/collections/all" | python3 -c '
import sys,json,subprocess,os
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
for h in d.get("value",[]):
  name=h.get("id")
  print("discover", name)
  subprocess.call(["curl","-sS","-u",os.environ.get("AUTH","cmkadmin:PortCmk1!"),
    "-X","POST","-H","Accept: application/json","-H","Content-Type: application/json",
    "-d","{\"mode\":\"refresh\"}",
    f"http://127.0.0.1/cmk/check_mk/api/1.0/objects/host/{name}/actions/discover_services/invoke"])
' || true

# activate again after discovery
ETAG=$(curl -sS -u "$AUTH" -D - -o /dev/null -H "Accept: application/json" \
  "${CMK}/domain-types/activation_run/collections/pending_changes" | tr -d '\r' | awk -F': ' 'tolower($1)=="etag"{print $2}')
curl -sS -u "$AUTH" -X POST \
  -H "Accept: application/json" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "If-Match: ${ETAG:-*}" \
  -d '{"redirect":false,"sites":["cmk"],"force_foreign_changes":true}' \
  "${CMK}/domain-types/activation_run/actions/activate-changes/invoke" | head -c 400
echo
echo DONE_CMK_FILL

#!/bin/bash
# Fill Checkmk hosts (ping-only / no-agent). Safe: only talks to Checkmk on localhost.
set -euo pipefail
export AUTH='cmkadmin:PortCmk1!'
CMK='http://127.0.0.1/cmk/check_mk/api/1.0'

api() {
  local method=$1 path=$2
  shift 2
  curl -sS -u "$AUTH" -X "$method" \
    -H 'Accept: application/json' \
    -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    "$@" "${CMK}${path}"
}

echo '=== ensure folder /port ==='
code=$(curl -sS -o /tmp/cmk_folder.json -w '%{http_code}' -u "$AUTH" \
  -H 'Accept: application/json' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"name":"port","title":"Port Office","parent":"/","attributes":{}}' \
  "${CMK}/domain-types/folder_config/collections/all" || true)
echo "folder_http=$code"
cat /tmp/cmk_folder.json | head -c 200; echo

add_host() {
  local name=$1 ip=$2 alias=$3
  echo -n "ADD $name ($ip) ... "
  body=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.dumps({'folder':'/port','host_name':'$name','attributes':{'ipaddress':'$ip','alias':'$alias','tag_agent':'no-agent'}}))")
  code=$(curl -sS -o /tmp/cmk_host.json -w '%{http_code}' -u "$AUTH" \
    -H 'Accept: application/json' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    -d "$body" "${CMK}/domain-types/host_config/collections/all" || true)
  echo "HTTP $code"
  if [ "$code" != "200" ] && [ "$code" != "204" ]; then
    head -c 180 /tmp/cmk_host.json; echo
  fi
}

# Core hosts — only if pingable
while IFS='|' read -r name ip alias; do
  [ -z "$name" ] && continue
  if ping -c1 -W1 "$ip" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    add_host "$name" "$ip" "$alias"
  else
    echo "SKIP offline $name $ip"
  fi
done <<'EOF'
proxmox|192.168.2.21|Proxmox port2
mail|192.168.2.140|Mail postfix VM124
samba|192.168.2.15|Samba Share
proxy|192.168.2.14|HAProxy Proxy VM121
mikopbx|192.168.2.116|MikoPBX VM119
gateway|192.168.2.1|MikroTik gateway
checkmk|127.0.0.1|Checkmk self
EOF

# Extra live IPs from common office range (named by last octet)
for ip in 192.168.2.10 192.168.2.12 192.168.2.100 192.168.2.109 192.168.2.111 192.168.2.114 192.168.2.119 192.168.2.121 192.168.2.122 192.168.2.130 192.168.2.160 192.168.2.200; do
  if ping -c1 -W1 "$ip" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    short="h${ip##*.}"
    add_host "$short" "$ip" "auto-discovered $ip" || true
  fi
done

echo '=== hosts now ==='
api GET '/domain-types/host_config/collections/all' | python3 -c '
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
vals=d.get("value",[])
print(len(vals),"hosts")
for x in vals:
  attrs=(x.get("extensions") or {}).get("attributes") or {}
  print("-", x.get("id"), attrs.get("ipaddress"), attrs.get("alias",""))
'

activate() {
  echo '=== activate changes ==='
  headers=$(mktemp)
  curl -sS -u "$AUTH" -D "$headers" -o /tmp/pending.json \
    -H 'Accept: application/json' \
    "${CMK}/domain-types/activation_run/collections/pending_changes"
  etag=$(tr -d '\r' < "$headers" | awk -F': ' 'tolower($1)=="etag"{print $2}')
  echo "ETAG=$etag"
  cat /tmp/pending.json | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pending", len(d.get("value",[])))' || true
  curl -sS -u "$AUTH" -X POST \
    -H 'Accept: application/json' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    -H "If-Match: ${etag:-*}" \
    -d '{"redirect":false,"sites":["cmk"],"force_foreign_changes":true}' \
    "${CMK}/domain-types/activation_run/actions/activate-changes/invoke" | tee /tmp/activate.json | head -c 500
  echo
  rm -f "$headers"
}

activate
sleep 3

echo '=== service discovery ==='
api GET '/domain-types/host_config/collections/all' | python3 - <<'PY'
import json,sys,subprocess,os
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
auth=os.environ["AUTH"]
for h in d.get("value",[]):
    name=h["id"]
    print("discover", name, flush=True)
    subprocess.run([
      "curl","-sS","-u",auth,"-X","POST",
      "-H","Accept: application/json","-H","Content-Type: application/json",
      "-d","{\"mode\":\"refresh\"}",
      f"http://127.0.0.1/cmk/check_mk/api/1.0/objects/host/{name}/actions/discover_services/invoke"
    ], check=False)
PY

activate
sleep 4

echo '=== monitored states ==='
api GET '/domain-types/host/collections/all' | python3 -c '
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print("monitored", len(d.get("value",[])))
for x in d.get("value",[]):
  ext=x.get("extensions") or {}
  print(x.get("id"), "state=", ext.get("state"), ext.get("name"))
' || true

echo DONE_FILL

#!/bin/bash
set -e
AUTH='cmkadmin:PortCmk1!'
CMK='http://127.0.0.1/cmk/check_mk/api/1.0'
cd /tmp

echo '==== HOST collection raw (first) ===='
curl -sS -u "$AUTH" -H 'Accept: application/json' \
  "$CMK/domain-types/host/collections/all" > hosts.json
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
d=json.load(open('hosts.json'))
print('count', len(d.get('value',[])))
if d.get('value'):
    print(json.dumps(d['value'][0], indent=2)[:2000])
print('--- keys sample ---')
for x in d.get('value',[])[:3]:
    print(x.get('id'), list((x.get('extensions') or {}).keys()), x.get('extensions'))
PY

echo
echo '==== SERVICE collection raw (PING mail) ===='
curl -sS -u "$AUTH" -H 'Accept: application/json' \
  "$CMK/domain-types/service/collections/all" > svc.json
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
d=json.load(open('svc.json'))
print('count', len(d.get('value',[])))
# find mail PING
for x in d.get('value',[]):
    ext=x.get('extensions') or {}
    if ext.get('host_name')=='mail':
        print(json.dumps(x, indent=2)[:2500])
        break
print('--- all services states ---')
for x in d.get('value',[]):
    ext=x.get('extensions') or {}
    print(ext.get('host_name'), ext.get('description'), 'state=', ext.get('state'), 'hard=', ext.get('hard_state'), 'keys=', list(ext.keys()))
PY

echo
echo '==== try query with columns / livestatus style ===='
# Checkmk REST: show object with query
curl -sS -u "$AUTH" -H 'Accept: application/json' \
  "$CMK/objects/host/mail" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | head -80

echo
echo '==== service object mail/PING ===='
# encode service name
curl -sS -u "$AUTH" -H 'Accept: application/json' \
  "$CMK/objects/host/mail/actions/show_service/invoke?service_description=PING" | head -c 1500
echo
curl -sS -u "$AUTH" -H 'Accept: application/json' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -X GET "$CMK/domain-types/service/collections/all?host_name=mail" | head -c 800
echo

echo '==== wait-for / status via cmk CLI livestatus ===='
su - cmk -c "lq 'GET hosts\nColumns: name address state hard_state plugin_output last_check\n'" 2>/dev/null || \
su - cmk -c "echo -e 'GET hosts\nColumns: name address state hard_state plugin_output last_check\n' | unixcat ~/tmp/run/live" 2>/dev/null || \
omd su cmk -c "echo -e 'GET hosts\nColumns: name state hard_state plugin_output last_check\n' | unixcat tmp/run/live" 2>/dev/null

echo
echo '==== services livestatus ===='
su - cmk -c "echo -e 'GET services\nColumns: host_name description state hard_state plugin_output last_check\nFilter: description = PING\n' | unixcat ~/tmp/run/live" 2>/dev/null || true

echo DONE_AUDIT

import socket
path="/omd/sites/cmk/tmp/run/live"
q="GET hosts\nColumns: name address state hard_state plugin_output last_check latency\n\n"

buf=b""
while True:

    buf+=chunk

content.text:
Готово — Port Infra переведён на **реальные статусы**, задеплоен на CT 126.

### Что изменилось

**Источник данных**
- Вместо REST collections (без `state`) — **Checkmk Livestatus** (`/omd/sites/cmk/tmp/run/live`)
- `state=None` больше **не считается UP** → `UNKNOWN`
- Дополнительно: **TCP/HTTP пробы** для почты (25/443/993), MikoPBX, Samba, Zabbix, Grafana и т.д.

**UI (v0.3.0)**
- **SSE** `/api/stream` — обновление каждые ~5 сек (вместо polling 20 сек)
- Вкладка **«Проблемы»** — Checkmk DOWN + упавшие пробы
- На карте: `last_check`, latency, `plugin_output`
- Индикатор live в шапке (зелёный = Livestatus OK)
- **WARN** (жёлтый) — PING OK, но сервисная проба упала; **DOWN** — только при падении Checkmk

**Текущее состояние**
- http://192.168.2.172:3080/ — **10 UP**, 0 проблем
- Livestatus: **16 хostов**, `livestatus_ok: true`
- Почта `.140` — UP (PING + 25/443/993/HTTPS)

### Логика статусов

| Уровень | Когда |
|---------|--------|
| **UP** | Checkmk PING OK, пробы OK |
| **WARN** | PING OK, но TCP/HTTP проба упала |
| **DOWN** | Checkmk PING/host DOWN или UNREACH |

### Код
- `port-infra/app.py` — в репозитории и на сервере `/opt/port-infra/app.py`

Прод не трогали — только CT 126.

---

**Дальше по желанию:**
1. Настроить порты Grafana (если не `:3000`, а через reverse proxy)
2. Добавить уведомления в Telegram при DOWN
3. CRUD узлов через UI (сейчас — API + drag на карте)

Port Infra — сводка и аналоги

16.07.2026 · live CT 126 · каталог v4 · не замена Zabbix/Grafana/Checkmk В шапке считаются только узлы с реальной проверкой (Checkmk Livestatus / TCP-пробы). Остальные 47 — инвентарь с карты из infra.txt, без ICMP. Это не «всё упало» — это «ещё не мониторятся».

Вывод: Port Infra — «операторский слой» поверх Checkmk/Zabbix, не конкурент им. Аналог по духу ближе к Status page + NetBox lite + change log.

План правок по этой сводке

сейчас}> P0 — мониторинг ICMP ping всех узлов с IP раз в 10 минут Кэш результатов в SQLite, не долбить на каждый SSE Шапка: up/down/warn/? из реальных проб Checkmk остаётся источником истины, где есть сейчас}> P0 — продукт Вкладка «Сводка» — coverage, зоны, проблемы Вкладка «Настройки» — интервал ping, SSE, Checkmk URL Поиск, pan/zoom уже есть — довести подписи статусов Не трогать почту / прод при деплое потом}> P1 — глубина Массово завести IP в Checkmk (PING-only) История uptime 7/30 дней Telegram при DOWN Связка deep-link в Zabbix/Grafana не делать}> Вне scope Deckhouse Observability Замена Zabbix или Grafana Агенты на все ВМ «ради красоты» Любые stop/reboot почты VM 124 В шапке не «10 up / 47 ?», а что-то вроде «~45–50 up» (сколько реально отвечает на ICMP) + «?» только у узлов без IP. Сводка показывает coverage % по зонам. Настройки позволяют сменить интервал ping без правок кода.

        _PROBE_CACHE.clear()
        return {"ok": True, "checked": checked, "up": up, "down": down, "at": now}

set -e

echo

python3 - <<'PY'
import json
d=json.load(open('/tmp/map.json'))
print('stats', d['stats'])
print('analytics coverage', d['analytics']['coverage_pct'], '%')
print('settings', {k:d['settings'][k] for k in ('ping_interval_sec','icmp_enabled','stream_interval_sec')})
print('last_ping', d['monitoring'].get('last_ping_round'))
PY

Сделано по сводке.

### Сводка vs аналоги
Открой canvas рядом с чатом: [port-infra-analytics](port-infra-analytics.canvas.tsx) — роли Port Infra / Checkmk / Zabbix / Grafana / Deckhouse и план P0–P1.

**Коротко:** «10 up» было потому, что статус брался только из Checkmk (~16 хостов). Остальные 47 — инвентарь без ICMP.

### После правок (live сейчас)
| Метрика | Было | Стало |
|--------|------|-------|
| up | 10 | **39** |
| down | 0 | **12** (демо iiko/prostor, crm2, филиал и т.п.) |
| ? | 47 | **6** (нет IP) |
| coverage | ~18% | **~90%** |

### Что в сайтике (v0.5)
- **ICMP раз в 10 мин** (настраивается)
- Вкладки **Сводка** / Проблемы / Узлы / Журнал / **Настройки**
- В настройках: интервал ping, SSE, вкл/выкл ICMP и TCP, кнопка **«Пинг сейчас»**
- Сводка: coverage %, аналоги со ссылками, разбивка по типам

Обнови http://192.168.2.172:3080/ — вкладка «Сводка».

Дальше по сводке (P1): массово в Checkmk, история uptime, TG-алерты — скажи, с чего продолжать.

from pathlib import Path

app = Path(r"C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\port-infra\app.py")
text = app.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
marker = '@app.get("/", response_class=HTMLResponse)\ndef index():\n    return HTML\n\n\nHTML = r"""'
idx = text.find(marker)
if idx < 0:
    raise SystemExit("marker not found")
head = text[:idx]
head += '''UI_PATH = Path(__file__).with_name("ui.html")


@app.get("/", response_class=HTMLResponse)
def index():
    return HTMLResponse(UI_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
'''
app.write_text(head, encoding="utf-8")
print("trimmed app.py to", len(head.splitlines()), "lines")

from pathlib import Path

app = Path(r"C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\port-infra\app.py")
lines = app.read_text(encoding="utf-8").splitlines(keepends=True)
out = []
for i, line in enumerate(lines):
    if line.startswith("HTML = r"):
        # drop from previous @app.get("/") for index if present — rebuild cleanly
        break
    out.append(line)

# Remove trailing index() that returns HTML
text = "".join(out)
# strip the old index handler at the end
needle = '@app.get("/", response_class=HTMLResponse)\ndef index():\n    return HTML\n'
if needle in text:
    text = text.replace(needle, "")
text = text.rstrip() + "\n\n"
text += '''UI_PATH = Path(__file__).with_name("ui.html")


@app.get("/", response_class=HTMLResponse)
def index():
    return HTMLResponse(UI_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
'''
app.write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")
print("ok lines", text.count("\n"))
